2604.03074.title: Speaker-Reasoner: Scaling Interaction Turns and Reasoning Patterns for Timestamped Speaker-Attributed ASR
2604.03074.paper_summary: Transcribing and understanding multi-speaker conversations requires speech recognition, speaker attribution, and timestamp localization. While speech LLMs excel at single-speaker tasks, multi-speaker scenarios remain challenging due to overlapping speech, backchannels, rapid turn-taking, and context window constraints. We propose Speaker-Reasoner, an end-to-end Speech LLM with agentic multi-turn temporal reasoning. Instead of single-pass inference, the model iteratively analyzes global audio structure, autonomously predicts temporal boundaries, and performs fine-grained segment analysis, jointly modeling speaker identity, gender, timestamps, and transcription. A speaker-aware cache further extends processing to audio exceeding the training context window. Trained with a three-stage progressive strategy, Speaker-Reasoner achieves consistent improvements over strong baselines on AliMeeting and AISHELL-4 datasets, particularly in handling overlapping speech and complex turn-taking.
2604.03074.paper_summary_zh: 轉錄和理解多說話者的對話需要語音識別、說話者歸屬和時間戳定位。雖然語音 LLM 在單一說話者任務中表現出色，但由於重疊語音、回應通道、快速輪流發言和上下文窗口限制，多說話者場景仍然具有挑戰性。我們提出了 Speaker-Reasoner，一種具有主動多輪時間推理的端到端語音 LLM。該模型不是單次推斷，而是迭代分析全球音頻結構，自主預測時間邊界，並執行細粒度的段落分析，聯合建模說話者身份、性別、時間戳和轉錄。具有說話者感知的緩存進一步擴展了對超過訓練上下文窗口的音頻的處理。通過三階段的漸進策略進行訓練，Speaker-Reasoner 在 AliMeeting 和 AISHELL-4 數據集上相對於強基準實現了一致的改進，特別是在處理重疊語音和複雜的輪流發言方面。
2604.03074.author: Zhennan Lin et.al.
2604.03074.authors: Zhennan Lin, Shuai Wang, Zhaokai Sun, Pengyuan Xie, Chuan Xie, Jie Liu, Qiang Zhang, Lei Xie
